creator: gamer@ryppn.com
text:
Further to the preceding, unfortunately this has not resolved the situation...

Nov 30 04:39:07 Mail postfix/policy-spf[73728]: Policy action=DEFER_IF_PERMIT SPF-Result=joules.com: Unknown error on DNS 'TXT' lookup of 'joules.com'
Nov 30 04:39:07 Mail postfix/smtpd[65987]: NOQUEUE: reject: RCPT from eu-smtp-delivery-230.mimecast.com[185.58.86.230]: 450 4.7.1 <user@localdomain>: Recipient address rejected: SPF-Result=joules.com: Unknown error on DNS 'TXT' lookup of 'joules.com'; from=<no-reply@joules.com> to=<user@localdomain> proto=ESMTP helo=<eu-smtp-delivery-230.mimecast.com>
